overall.description: A first-person perspective from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a nighttime walk through a grassy prairie. The player moves slowly through tall grass toward distant mountains under a moon partially obscured by clouds, with a brief interaction prompt appearing for a collectible plant.

events.description: game interaction prompt appears for picking and examining a plant

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through open grassland toward distant mountains, approaching a collectible plant

entered.detail: bright full moon partially visible through scattered dark clouds
dark silhouetted mountain peaks against the night sky
expansive field of green grass illuminated by moonlight
narrow winding dirt path cutting through the grass
low shrubbery and small plants dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie at night, with the camera moving forward through grass toward distant mountains. Moonlight filters through scattered clouds, illuminating the landscape with a cool blue glow. A dirt trail is visible to the left, and low bushes dot the terrain. Around 13 seconds, a game UI prompt appears indicating an interactive plant.

events.description: camera moves through tall grass blades that temporarily obscure the lower portion of the view
moon becomes more obscured by thickening clouds, reducing ambient illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through increasingly dense and tall grass vegetation

entered.detail: tall grass blades rising to eye level in the foreground
thick clusters of wild vegetation and leafy plants

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving through the prairie as the vegetation becomes denser and taller, with grass blades occasionally obscuring the view. The dirt trail fades from sight as the terrain becomes more overgrown. Around 45 seconds, clouds thicken over the moon, slightly dimming the landscape. The mountains remain visible in the distance throughout the continuous forward movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a moonlit prairie that gradually transitions from an open landscape into dense, overgrown vegetation. It begins by gliding through a wide expanse of grass toward distant mountains, with a cool blue glow filtering through scattered clouds and a dirt trail visible to the left. As the camera advances, a game UI prompt briefly appears for an interactive plant before the surrounding greenery becomes taller and more obstructive. The scene then shifts as the dirt trail fades from view and the clouds thicken over the moon, dimming the light across the terrain. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the thickening brush while the silhouette of the mountains remains a constant fixture on the horizon.
